reviews.comment:
Hacia mucho tiempo no paraba en una ACA, que este tan bien cuidada y prolija. Lugar para descansar, baños impecables,  buena atención..  10de10

(Translated by Google)
It had been a long time since I'd stayed at an ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) that was so well-maintained and clean. A place to rest, spotless bathrooms, great service... 10 out of 10.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9804125904812315909/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUREdU1yYll3EAE

reviews.comment:
ACA sierra grande malisima atencion en tres dias distintos les explique que tenian que cargar el nro de dni para el descuento de socio pues bien solo uno lo hizo y obtuve el descuentos los otros 2 parece que el descuento lo pagaran ellos . el full horrible

(Translated by Google)
The service at the Sierra Grande branch was terrible. On three separate days, I explained that they needed to upload my ID number for the member discount. Well, only one person did it, and I received the discount. The other two seemed to think they were paying for it themselves. The whole experience was awful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9804125904812315909/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNEbTlla2V3EAE

reviews.comment:
Mientras se llenaba el tanque ni se ofrecen para limpiarte el parabrisas y ganarse una propina

(Translated by Google)
While the tank was being filled, they didn't even offer to clean the windshield and earn a tip.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9804125904812315909/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNEbmNDcV9BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un lugar espectacular, yo creo que es la mejor estación de servicio del país! Buena atención, servicio, amabilidad. Ojalá siga así!! Sin convertirse en full !!

(Translated by Google)
A spectacular place, I think it's the best gas station in the country! Great service, friendly staff. I hope it stays this way!! Without becoming a full-service station!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9804125904812315909/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ5czZLU3N3RRAB
